case_title: DAVID GRISEL VS. CHRISOPHER PORTER et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-03-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-17-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT JURY REQUESTED FILED BY DEFENDANT PORTER, CHRISOPHER JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS

PERSONAL INJURY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRISEL, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT PORTER, CHRISOPHER DOES 1-25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-17-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-18-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-02-2003
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BRATT, TIMOTHY CRAVEN SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR GRISEL, DAVID
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-17-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT PORTER, CHRISOPHER
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 225 SET FOR JUL-01-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. AUG-04-2003 ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 225 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-12-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-17-2003. MAR-03-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR RICHARD MERLE KAPLAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-03-2003 THROUGH JUL-02-2003.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-04-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEC-17-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT - EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-27-2003.
LETTER DATED 4-14-03 FROM ARBITRATOR RICHARD M. KAPLAN STATING CASE SETTLED PER ATTY. TIMOTHY BRATT
CRC 225 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-01-2003 CONTINUED TO AUG-12-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
